name_cn:
MCM Aren Visetos
X-mini Chunky Strap Camera Crossbody Bag
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac Color
This ultra-mini Aren crossbody bag is made of classic Visetos material and is the perfect hands-free bag for travel. It is a main bag for creating stylish looks, designed for the global mobile generation with a lightweight construction that allows for greater freedom of movement.
Model: MMRAAKC02CO001
Size: Mini 17*5*12.5cm Medium 22*5.5*15.5
Strap: 79-138cm
Color: Cognac/Brown
